title: Classic Enchanted Golden Apple Crafting
description: Bring back the classic recipe for Enchantment Golden Apple!
body:
### Bring back the classic recipe for Enchantment Golden Apple!

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d509bffba11fc21ab136c970549937c362063269.png)

### You can get the recipe from holding a gold ingot.

See the full version in [Enchanted Goldee Apple Addition](https://modrinth.com/datapack/enchanted-golden-apple-addition).

**Please ignore datapack version warning when the game version is under 1.20.2.**
